translations.en: Lensmaker
translations.zh: 造透鏡者

translations.en: a very old gargoyle.
translations.zh: 極為年邁之魔像。

translations.en: The gargoyle gasps in terror and wheezes, "An-bal-sil-fer!"
translations.zh: 魔像驚恐地喘息，氣喘吁吁地嘶喊：「An-bal-sil-fer！」

translations.en: Then he faints dead away!
translations.zh: 而後他徹底昏厥！

translations.en: The gargoyle gasps in terror and wheezes, "The False Prophet!"
translations.zh: 魔像驚恐地喘息，氣喘吁吁地嘶喊：「偽先知！」

translations.en: Then he faints dead away!
translations.zh: 而後他徹底昏厥！

translations.en: The venerable gargoyle peers at you.
translations.zh: 這位德高望重的魔像仔細打量你。

translations.en: "Greetings, False Prophet."
translations.zh: 「問候，偽先知。」

translations.en: "To have been told by @Naxatilor, long ago, that the you would one day come to me, wearing the Amulet of Submission."
translations.zh: 「久前@Naxatilor曾告知吾，汝有朝一日將來見吾，頸間佩戴臣服護符。」

translations.en: "To never have believed it would come to pass."
translations.zh: 「吾從未信以為真，以為此事不可能發生。」

translations.en: "To ask what service I can perform?"
translations.zh: 「問有何可效勞之處？」

translations.en: "To ask how again I may help you?"
translations.zh: 「再問有何可助汝之處？」

translations.en: "To wonder why you have not brought back the broken lens?!"
translations.zh: 「納悶汝為何未將碎裂的透鏡帶回？！」

translations.en: "To have already told you that I need it in order to craft a new one!"
translations.zh: 「早已告知汝，吾需要碎片方能製作新的透鏡！」

translations.en: "To ask what you think I can do without it?"
translations.zh: 「問汝以為吾沒有碎片能做什麼？」

translations.en: "To remember little from so long ago," the gargoyle croaks.
translations.zh: 「年代久遠，吾所記已甚少，」魔像喉音沙啞道。

translations.en: "To require the pieces of the lens in order to make a new copy."
translations.zh: 「需要透鏡碎片，方能製作新的複製品。」

translations.en: "To lack a name, of course."
translations.zh: 「當然，吾沒有名字。」

translations.en: "But to be called Lor-wis-lem, the scholar of light, by many learned gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「然許多博學之魔像稱吾為洛爾-維斯-蘭，即光之學者。」

translations.en: As he says this, the ancient gargoyle beams with pride.
translations.zh: 說此話時，這位古老魔像面露自豪之色。

translations.en: "To craft the finest lenses in the land," the gargoyle says proudly.
translations.zh: 「打造此地最精良之透鏡，」魔像自豪地說。

translations.en: "Also to teach my young @apprentices not to cut themselves on the glass!"
translations.zh: 「亦教導年輕@apprentices學徒勿讓玻璃割傷自己！」

translations.en: "To be nearing the end of my @time."
translations.zh: 「吾之@time時日已近末途。」

translations.en: "To have one last sacred duty:"
translations.zh: 「吾有最後一項神聖職責：」

translations.en: "To pass on my skill to the next generation."
translations.zh: 「將吾之技藝傳承予下一代。」

translations.en: "To be over a thousand years old."
translations.zh: 「吾已逾千歲。」

translations.en: "To seem a mere youth compared to @Naxatilor, however."
translations.zh: 「然與@Naxatilor相比，吾不過是個少年。」

translations.en: "To have helped Naxatilor create the Vortex Lens, centuries ago."
translations.zh: 「數百年前，曾協助納薩蒂製作渦旋透鏡。」

translations.en: "To have found him venerable and ancient even then!"
translations.zh: 「即便在當時，吾便已覺得他德高望重、飽經歲月！」

translations.en: "To be honored to have helped you, False Prophet."
translations.zh: 「能助偽先知一臂之力，深感榮幸。」

translations.en: "To be old. To suggest you ask that of others."
translations.zh: 「吾年邁。此事建議汝去問旁人。」

translations.en: "To see the shattered Vortex Lens you carry."
translations.zh: 「見汝攜帶已碎裂之渦旋透鏡。」

translations.en: "To remember making it, so very long ago."
translations.zh: 「記得製作此物之時，已是極久以前的事了。」

translations.en: Taking the shards of glass, the lensmaker turns to his grinding table.
translations.zh: 取過玻璃碎片，造透鏡者轉向研磨台。

translations.en: In a short while, he has crafted a new Vortex Lens!
translations.zh: 不多時，他已打造出全新的渦旋透鏡！

translations.en: "To have far greater skill now than when first I made this lens," he says smugly.
translations.zh: 「如今技藝遠勝初次製作此透鏡之時，」他自鳴得意道。

translations.en: "To require little time to repair it."
translations.zh: 「修復所需時間甚短。」

translations.en: He hands you the restored Vortex Lens.
translations.zh: 他將修復後的渦旋透鏡交給你。

translator_notes: 造透鏡者為千歲以上的老魔像工匠，曾與納薩蒂合作打造渦旋透鏡。語氣沉穩淡然，自豪於技藝。關鍵道具互動（收碎片→製新透鏡）旁白保持敘述清晰。
